title: Leetcode 139. Word Break
shortDescription: Determine whether the string s can be segmented into a sequence of one or more words from wordDict (words may be reused). The core challenge is prefix segmentation/reachability over string indices, typically solved with DP or BFS using the dictionary (max word length ≤ 20 limits checks).

Were You Asked This?
Leetcode 139. Word Break

Determine whether the string s can be segmented into a sequence of one or more words from wordDict (words may be reused). The core challenge is prefix segmentation/reachability over string indices, typically solved with DP or BFS using the dictionary (max word length ≤ 20 limits checks).

Asked at:

Google

Late March, 2026

Google

Junior

I was asked a slight variation of this question. The only difference was that wordDict was set of known elements of maximum length of 3. So I had to make the word using any of those parts, but those parts were only 1, 2 and 3 characters long. The solution for WordBreak works actually there.
